allow: Bash(python3.exe -c "n=7; base_w=round\(1/n,6\); keys=[''a'',''b'',''c'',''d'',''e'',''f'',''g'']; weights={k:base_w for k in keys}; weights[keys[-1]]=round\(1.0-base_w*\(n-1\),6\); print\(''weights:'',list\(weights.values\(\)\)\); print\(''sum:'',sum\(weights.values\(\)\)\); print\(''all-pass score:'',sum\(1*w for w in weights.values\(\)\)\)")
